title: cineraria arctotidea
intro: Cineraria arctotidea, also known as the Cape marigold or West African cineraria, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, Cineraria arctotidea has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and acting as an antiseptic. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Cineraria arctotidea can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
